task_completion.description: Apply the required filters on the Energy Star Product Finder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser showing the Energy Star Product Finder with filters applied for 'Top Freezer' and Total Volume between 16.0 and 19.0 cubic feet.

task_completion.description: Sort the filtered results by Annual Energy Use
task_completion.visual_evidence: The results table on the webpage shows the 'Annual Energy Use (kWh/yr)' column sorted from low to high (indicated by an ascending sort arrow or the values visibly increasing).

task_completion.description: Export the filtered list to the Downloads folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser download popup, download history, or a file manager window showing the exported file (e.g., CSV or Excel) located in the ~/Downloads/ directory.

task_completion.description: Bookmark the results page in a specific folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmark dialog or bookmarks menu showing the page being saved into a folder explicitly named 'Appliance Procurement'.

task_completion.description: Record the top 3 distinct models in a JSON file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of 'fridge_selection.json' in ~/Documents/, containing a JSON array with exactly 3 objects. Each object must have the keys 'rank', 'brand_name', 'model_number', and 'annual_energy_use_kwh'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Energy Star website via a web browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Firefox browser navigating the real energystar.gov website, rather than using terminal curl commands or local mocked HTML files.

integrity.description: The recorded JSON data matches the website results
integrity.visual_evidence: The brand names, model numbers, and energy use values in the JSON file match the top 3 results visible in the sorted table on the Energy Star webpage.

integrity.description: The energy use values are realistic and not hallucinated
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'annual_energy_use_kwh' values in the JSON are realistic for this size category (approximately 326-348 kWh/yr), rather than implausibly low numbers (like 200) or copied blindly from a prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is energystar.gov. The required bookmark folder is exactly 'Appliance Procurement'. The JSON file must be saved to ~/Documents/fridge_selection.json. The volume filter must be strictly between 16.0 and 19.0 cubic feet. Realistic annual energy use for Top Freezer refrigerators of this size is approximately 326-348 kWh/yr; values significantly lower than this are implausible and indicate hallucination.
